issues.description: Action type 'ReturnToHand' is incorrect. Card effect places opponent's Character 'at the bottom of the owner's deck', not to hand. Should use a custom action or clarify as deck-bottom placement, not ReturnToHand.

Missing second conditional action: 'if you do not have 5 Characters with cost 5 or more, place this Character at the bottom of the owner's deck.' Current DSL only represents the first part of the effect.
Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' is missing 'up to 1' quantifier. Should clarify max selection is 1 character.
